title: COVID-19 Update November 12
excerpt: As per the news conference held by Jason Kenney today regarding new public health restrictions for sports and fitness, the Edmonton Squash Club will be temporarily closing as of midnight November 13 through until November 27. We are currently evaluating the exceptions to indoor and group fitness, and should we fall under that category then … Read more
content:
As per the news conference held by Jason Kenney today regarding new public health restrictions for sports and fitness, the Edmonton Squash Club will be temporarily closing as of midnight November 13 through until November 27.

We are currently evaluating the exceptions to indoor and group fitness, and should we fall under that category then we will be posting an update to the website and sending an email to all of our active members.
